title: Sh monsterarts angels
wikitext:
[]: Sh monsterarts angels             Quote Post by Eva-03 » Sun Feb 22, 2015 12:36 pm Does anyone know when the sh monsterarts angels will be released?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Feb 22, 2015 1:01 pm Ooh, that's a thing? One step closer to Godzilla, I hope!

[]:             Quote Post by Eva-03 » Sun Feb 22, 2015 1:24 pm Do you think they would be in scale with the Eva evolution revoltechs?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Mon Feb 23, 2015 12:26 am Those were announced a long time ago now (Q4, 2012)... So, many doubt they will be released now as no date or price was given and no info or new pics have emerged... But given the size of the supports and a hand next to one in one picture, they would have been approximately in the scale you (and frankly I and many more too) wanted...

[]:             Quote Post by Eva-03 » Mon Feb 23, 2015 3:10 pm Oh. Do you know any other angel figures in scale with the evolution line then?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Mon Feb 23, 2015 10:42 pm There are a few statues (Soul of Soft Vinyl ( Sachi , Samshel , Israfel ) and Bandai to name some)... Most angels are either statues or gashapons ... As you ask for Evangelion Evolutions, I suppose you're looking for Rebuild angels... So then, none... In the NGE side... The only "articulated" ones are the SEGA Real Action Models, Sachiel and Zeruel those are pretty old and nearly impossible to find nowadays, one sold at Ebay over a 100 Dollars afew days ago... Those are on perfect scale with Revoltechs, I compare the Zeruel one with a first gen. Revoltech Eva 01 here ... I know Bandai made an articulated Sachiel , but I have never seen that one personally, althoug statue versions can be found , I don't know much about their scale, but, if that Zeruel is on scale with my statue Sachiel , then they're also in scale with Revos (more or less)...

[]:             Quote Post by Eva-03 » Tue Feb 24, 2015 8:45 pm Are the Gx chogokins in scale with the vinyl angels?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Tue Feb 24, 2015 11:29 pm Eva-03 wrote: Are the Gx chogokins in scale with the vinyl angels?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva-03 » Wed Feb 25, 2015 7:19 am Alright i will look into that thread. Thanks for your help.
